title: Simple Structures: Desert
description: This modification adds 30 simple structures to the Desert biome.
body:
This modification adds **37** structures to the minecraft world for the Desert biome. 

![An example of one of the structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d424d8c41842083e7096baf5670a80a5c7d55ce3.png)

![An example of one of the structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f506a26abc886cb2e236a12193fc73f71e98880.png)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________
### [All projects are Simple Structures](https://modrinth.com/collection/vinouI3O)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

### Compatibility 

 - Biomes O' Plenty
 - Terralith.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**License** - you can use the data pack materials in any of your projects, just specify the authorship.


_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**AI** - only the project icon was generated
